productName: CBG Peach Mango Fruit Nom 10-Pack 1:1 CBG:THC 200mg
description: Tender soft, juicy peach chews made for serious snack lovers — bold fruit, candy-shop texture, and a clean cannabis infusion in every piece. It blends CBG to support daytime focus and clarity and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 1:1 ratio. Enjoy slowly and let the infused finish settle in at its own pace.
